digest.top_line: ARTO: first RCT signal MDT improves OS + PCSS in oligomet mCRPC; MDT/SBRT consistently delays progression across oligorecurrent HSPC.
digest.tldr: EAU 2026 prostate: MDT/SBRT delays progression and defers systemic Tx consistently across STOMP, ORIOLE, WOLVERINE, RADIOSA, but guideline integration stays unresolved given heterogeneous endpoints and small N. ARTO is the first RCT to hint at OS + PCSS benefit in castration-resistant oligomets. Selection refinement via PSMA PET burden (PP3) is the key next step.

sites.intro: Oligomet prostate MDT evidence is maturing across multiple RCTs, with ARTO providing the first randomised OS signal in the castration-resistant setting.

studies.name: EAU 2026: MDT/SBRT Intensification in Oligometastatic Prostate Cancer (Fonteyne)
studies.tldr: EAU review: MDT/SBRT delays progression and defers systemic Tx in oligomet HSPC; ARTO is the first RCT hinting at an OS benefit.
details: 📊 Most MDT evidence is metachronous oligorecurrent HSPC: delays progression, defers systemic therapy
📊 ARTO: first randomized signal MDT may improve OS + PCSS (added to SOC, castration-resistant oligomets)
📊 WOLVERINE: MDT improved PFS + rPFS and delayed progression to CRPC, but OS not significant

details.text: 🔗 Other MDT trials cited (directional, no effect sizes in source)
subdetails: RADIOSA: ADT + MDT improved PFS vs MDT alone
STOMP / ORIOLE: excellent local control, delayed progression, minimal toxicity
RAVENS: adding Ra-223 to MDT did not improve PFS or MFS
LUNAR (ongoing): Lu-177 + MDT; radioligand + MDT not yet shown to add benefit

details: 🔍 De novo oligomet evidence thin; ongoing STAMPEDE2 (SBRT), PLATON, TERPS, OLIGOPRESTO
🔍 SOLAR (n=21): testosterone recovery with sustained low PSA after MDT, a treatment-free-interval concept
⚠️ SOLAR (synchronous) vs SATURN (metachronous): synchronous appeared more favorable, hypothesis-generating only
⚠️ Trials small with heterogeneous inclusion + endpoints, so guideline integration stays unresolved
⚠️ Selection is the key gap; PSMA PET burden (PP3) may refine beyond the ≤5-lesion cutoff
open_questions: Optimal patient selection for MDT (PSMA PET burden vs lesion count)
MDT role in de novo oligometastatic HSPC
Whether MDT improves OS beyond the ARTO signal

related_trials.brief_title: Veterans Affairs Seamless Phase II/III Randomized Trial of STAndard Systemic theRapy With or Without PET-directed Local Therapy for Oligometastatic pRosTate Cancer
related_trials.brief_summary: This is a prospective, open-label, multi-center seamless phase II to phase III randomized clinical trial designed to compare SST with or without PET-directed local therapy in improving the castration-resistant prostate cancer-free survival (CRPC-free survival) for Veterans with oligometastatic prostate cancer. Oligometastasis will be defined as 1-10 sites of metastatic disease based on the clinical determination of the LSI which incorporates all imaging, clinical, and pathologic data available.

interventions.name: Salvage Local Therapy for locally recurrent disease
Prostate-directed Radiation for De novo oligometastatic prostate cancer

related_trials.relevance_phrase: phase 2/3 RCT: PET-directed MDT, 1–10 lesion eligibility

related_trials.brief_title: Prostate-cancer Treatment Using Stereotactic Radiotherapy for Oligometastases Ablation in Hormone-sensitive Patients
related_trials.brief_summary:
INDICATION: Oligometastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer patients. METHODOLOGY: Open label, double arm, randomized 1:1, multicenter phase III study.

PRIMARY OBJECTIVE: To assess the efficacy of ablative radiotherapy (SBRT applied to all oligometastases) administered to all gross tumor sites (metastases and prostate if applicable), in oligometastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer patients.

interventions.name: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy (SBRT) + Standard of care

related_trials.answers_question: MDT role in de novo oligometastatic HSPC
related_trials.relevance_phrase: phase 3 RCT: ablative SBRT to all mets+prostate, M1 HSPC

related_trials.brief_title: Metastasis-directed Therapy for Oligorecurrent Prostate Cancer
related_trials.brief_summary: The aim is to investigate whether the addition of short-term androgen deprivation therapy (ADT) during 1 month or short-term ADT during 6 months together with an androgen receptor targeted therapy (ARTA) to metastasis-directed therapy (MDT) significantly prolongs poly-metastatic free survival (PMFS) and/or metastatic castration-refractory prostate cancer free survival (mCRPC-FS) in patients with oligorecurrent hormone sensitive prostate cancer.
related_trials.eligibility_brief:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Histologically proven initial diagnosis of prostate adenocarcinoma
* Priory treated and controlled primary tumor
* Biochemical recurrence defined by prostate-specific antigen (PSA) values \>0,2 ng/ml (i.e., two consecutive increases) following radical prostatectomy +…

papers.title: EAU 2026: What Evidence Do We Have from Intensification with SBRT?
papers.abstract: EAU 2026 Hormone sensitive metastatic prostate cancer, metastasis-directed therapy (MDT) in oligometastatic prostate cancer, STOMP and ORIOLE.
